# Robots.txt for S NEW ROOF
# https://snewroof.com

# Allow all search engines
User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Sitemap location
Sitemap: https://snewroof.com/sitemap.xml

# LLM.txt for AI assistants
Sitemap: https://snewroof.com/llm.txt

# Google specific
User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Bing specific
User-agent: Bingbot
Allow: /
Crawl-delay: 1

# Social media crawlers
User-agent: facebookexternalhit
Allow: /

User-agent: Twitterbot
Allow: /

User-agent: LinkedInBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Pinterest
Allow: /

# AI Crawlers - Allow for visibility
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Anthropic-AI
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Allow: /

# Block sensitive paths (none currently, but good practice)
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /_next/
Disallow: /private/

# Allow assets
Allow: /images/
Allow: /gallery/
Allow: /avatars/

# Crawl rate
Crawl-delay: 1

# Host preference
Host: https://snewroof.com
